excluded.reason: CPT block is editor-only, no frontend rendering or dark mode
CPT block is editor-only, responsive behavior is handled by WordPress editor
CPT block has no frontend render with headings
CPT block is editor-only, semantic HTML is in the card template part, not the block
CPT block does not render images on frontend

extra.description: Template lock enforcement: new Testimonial posts have the CPT block pre-inserted and blocks cannot be added/removed/moved
Inserter restriction: TestimonialCPT block does NOT appear in block inserter search
Meta persistence: all 5 meta fields (name, message, videoSource, videoFile, videoId) persist after save and reload
Sidebar panel renders in Post tab with all meta fields for testimonial post type only
Sidebar panel does NOT render on other post types (e.g., regular posts/pages)
Dual-location sync: editing a field in the block body updates the sidebar panel, and vice versa
Auto-title sync: changing the 'name' meta field updates the post title
Video source toggle: selecting 'file' shows media uploader, selecting 'youtube'/'vimeo' shows text input for video ID
REST API meta exposure: GET /wp/v2/testimonial/{id} returns all meta fields in the response
